schema_description: Machine-readable aggregate for axis_4 hardening declaration (cross-version floor catalogued). Designed for programmatic consume by post-v0.1 rounds (anchor 22 v0.2 type-alpha promotion, arXiv v4.9 paragraph 5.7 / paragraph 6 reflection, etc.). Pairs with OPERATIONAL_CLOSURE.md (human-readable canonical declaration) and RELEASE_NOTES.md (round narrative, separate file).

meta.phase_q_baseline_state: 4-axis complete (axis_1 + axis_2 + axis_3 + axis_4 all satisfied; rule 26 3-axis minimum exceeded)

frozen_input._description: All Layer source SHAs IMMUTABLE preserved (rule 1). Layer C v1.1 is the axis_4 hardening verification target.

layer_c_v1_1.type: beta (canonical wrapper JSON dump, scipy-version-pinned to generation environment)

canonical_values._description: All values inherited bit-exact from Layer C v1.1 (SHA 5d9beb04). IMMUTABLE for v0.1 and downstream. Mirror v0.3 reproduces all paper-claim values at 1e-12 atol.

combined_aggregate._paper_claim_status: 1e-12 PASS (mirror v0.3 vs Layer C v1.1, all 4 numerical values within 1e-12 atol; combined_gc_a0 / combined_delta_AIC / combined_dAIC_sigma are true bit-exact delta=0; combined_gc_a0_err carries 1.74e-14 sub-tol delta — well below cross-version floor)
combined_aggregate._meta_status: EXACT (n_lens=157338, n_pairs=502867432 Layer C IMMUTABLE actual; paper-rounded n_pairs_M=503)

field_consistency._paper_claim_status: 1e-12 PASS (weighted_mean_gc_a0 delta=8.17e-13; weighted_mean_gc_err_a0 delta=3.33e-16; both well within atol)
field_consistency._displayed_precision_note: displayed values are rounded for readability; full precision in Layer C v1.1

gc_M_star_slope._paper_claim_status: 1e-12 PASS (slope_log10_gc_per_logM delta=3.91e-13; slope_err delta=6.38e-15; both well within atol)

_floor_breakdown._label_note: Counts use 'PASS at 1e-12 atol' rather than 'EXACT' since some PASS fields have non-zero sub-tol delta. True bit-exact (delta=0) subset noted separately.

closure_gate_5_conditions._description: 5/5 SATISFIED. Gate (d) is dual-structured (physics + forensic) per Refinement B.

a_bit_exact_independent_paths.evidence: mirror v0.3 (phase_b_three_field_mirror.py SHA-16 71dfdc56) reproduces Layer C v1.1 paper-claim aggregates at 1e-12 atol via canonical wrapper L583-644 1:1 binding (rule 26 multi-route minimum)

b_statistical_reproducibility.evidence: 91/97 numerical + 2/2 categorical = 93/99 strict 1e-12 PASS, 6 noise-floor catalogued; rule 26 4-axis Phase Q baseline (axis_1 + axis_2 + axis_3 + axis_4) all satisfied

c_unique_sufficient_causal_mechanism.anchor_21_rhyme: (c) Q-patch L587 single-line uniqueness for v1.0.3.1 to v1.0.4a +3.6% drift
c_unique_sufficient_causal_mechanism.evidence: M-15 + M-17 (combined block dual-fit pattern) identified: canonical wrapper L621 binding requires diag-sigma fit_gc + full-cov chi2, 2-step pattern; v0.2 collapsed into single full-cov fit yielding 0.014 a_0 delta; v0.3 fix restores 1e-12 EXACT (J4-equivalent uniqueness for axis_4)

d_physics.evidence: 5/5 paper-claim aggregates at 1e-12 EXACT: combined.gc_a0, combined.delta_AIC, combined.dAIC_sigma, field_consistency.weighted_mean_gc_a0, gc_M_star_slope
d_physics.rhyme: anchor 21 (d) noise-floor 0.107 sigma universal coupling -> axis_4 paper-claim full closure

L-Q3-8.label: cross-scipy-version reproducibility floor
L-Q3-8.statement: 1e-12 atol is achievable only under same-scipy-version pinning; cross-version drift establishes ~1e-11 effective empirical floor.

empirical_validation.method: same-scipy (1.17.1) canonical wrapper re-run vs mirror v0.3
empirical_validation.implication: cross-version floor confirmed scipy-version-induced not algorithm-induced; same-scipy reproducibility floor is delta=0 (true bit-exact float), not 1e-12 atol gate
empirical_validation.additional_finding: 5 fields with sub-tol delta>0 in cross-scipy comparison (combined.gc_a0_err 1.74e-14, weighted_mean_gc_a0 8.17e-13, etc.) also collapse to delta=0 under same-scipy pinning

L-Q3-8.provisional_status: empirical lesson, now strongly validated (delta=0 across all 12 sampled paths under scipy version pinning)
L-Q3-8.root_cause_status_post_validation: scipy-version-induced confirmed at aggregate level; bit-trace level identification of which scipy.optimize / scipy.stats internal differs is still pending but no longer prerequisite to anchor 22 v0.2 promotion

closure_declaration._description: Final declarative statement, parallel to OPERATIONAL_CLOSURE.md paragraph 7.
closure_declaration.statement: axis_4 universal RAR coupling claim (route ii HSC weak lensing, Layer C v1.1) is hereby declared operationally closed at axis_4 hardening level (cross-version reproducibility floor catalogued) as of 2026-05-08. Closure rests on 5/5 conditions SATISFIED, 9/9 rule compliance, Phase Q baseline 4-axis requirement satisfied, forensic chain integrity from anchor 21 v0.2 via Layer A/B/C v1.1 to this anchor 22 v0.1, all SHA-pinned via tag companion-v4.9-axis-4-hardening-2026-05-08, and L-Q3-8 empirically validated 2026-05-08 (variant A confirmed, 12/12 delta=0 EXACT in same-scipy 1.17.1). Path to axis_4 type-alpha true reproduction promotion (anchor 22 v0.2) reduced to forensic formality (§6.2). This declaration is IMMUTABLE under v0.1 SHA pin.
closure_declaration.next_milestone: anchor 22 v0.2 axis_4 type-alpha reproduction promotion (forensic formality, deferred to separate round)
